task_completion.description: The Viagra.csv dataset is loaded into JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application is open and displays the dataset with columns 'libido' and 'dose'.

task_completion.description: The numerical group '1' in the 'dose' variable is renamed to 'Placebo'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the JASP data view or factor levels dialog, the 'dose' variable shows a level explicitly named 'Placebo'.

task_completion.description: A One-Way ANOVA is set up with 'libido' as the Dependent Variable and 'dose' as the Fixed Factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ANOVA analysis panel is open with 'libido' in the 'Dependent Variable' box and 'dose' in the 'Fixed Factors' box.

task_completion.description: A 'simple' contrast is configured for 'dose' against the 'Placebo' reference category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Contrasts' section of the ANOVA panel, the factor 'dose' has 'simple' selected from the dropdown menu, and 'Placebo' is set or indicated as the reference category.

task_completion.description: Descriptive statistics are included in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Descriptive statistics' checkbox is checked in the ANOVA options, or a 'Descriptives' table is visible in the JASP results pane.

task_completion.description: The JASP project is saved to the expected output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the file being saved as 'Viagra_Contrasts.jasp', or the JASP window title bar displays 'Viagra_Contrasts.jasp'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the JASP graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the JASP application window, menus, and dialog boxes being actively used, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results pane displays standard JASP-formatted tables for ANOVA, Contrasts, and Descriptives, not manually typed text or external images.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI to directly write the .jasp file via a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows step-by-step configuration of the ANOVA and saving the file through the JASP 'Save As' dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input dataset is '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Viagra.csv'. The actual variable names in the dataset are lowercase 'libido' and 'dose'. The agent must manually rename the numerical group '1' to 'Placebo' to set it as the reference level. The contrast type must be 'simple' against the 'Placebo' reference. The final project must be saved as 'Viagra_Contrasts.jasp'.
